headlines.description: Borussia Dortmund demolished Augsburg 5-1 in the Bundesliga on Saturday in a perfect dress rehearsal ahead of next week's Champions League semi-final return leg at Paris St Germain.
headlines.shortLinkText: Outgoing Reus scores in Dortmund's UCL warm-up

video.headline: Borussia Dortmund hammer Augsburg 5-1 in the Bundesliga

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Borussia Dortmund vs. FC Augsburg - Game Highlights) 2024/05/04 ESHEET

headlines.description: VfB Stuttgart scored two late goals to snatch a 3-1 win over visitors Bayern Munich in the Bundesliga on Saturday, spoiling the Bavarians' preparations for their Champions League semi-final return leg against Real Madrid next week.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bayern slump to loss at Stuttgart as Madrid await

video.headline: Stuttgart shock Bayern Munich in 3-1 win

tracking.trackingName: COM_SOC Highlight (VfB Stuttgart vs. Bayern Munich - Game Highlights) 2024/05/04 ESHEET
